plugins.name: prof-data-analyst
plugins.description: Professional Data Analyst + Analytics Engineer harness — 9 modes, 14 methods, 14 stdlib scripts, 4 mandatory rules + Proactive Suggestion at Mode Exit, planning protocol (TH1/TH2), 4 modeling patterns, 6-section governance, 5 orchestration patterns (Airflow/dbt/cron/GHA/Apps Script), storytelling, suggestion protocol (8 extension categories), schema-source hierarchy (5-tier) + portable semantic-layer recipe + MoMo stakeholder extensions (Semantic Cube + momo-data MCP + Mimir tag + OpenMetadata)
